title: Document native LCI client usage and examples
description: Write docs/lci-client-guide.md covering: (1) transport setup (SLIP, BLE), (2) example coap-client commands for each resource, (3) Python aiocoap examples, (4) CBOR payload examples, (5) troubleshooting. Reference spec/11-lci.md for authoritative format.
acceptance_criteria: Guide exists with working examples that can be copy-pasted
close_reason: Created docs/lci-client-guide.md with transport setup, coap-client examples, Python aiocoap examples, CBOR payloads, and troubleshooting
